mapper.select: {call sp_book_ticket( #{userId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scheduleId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{passengerName, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passengerIdNumber, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{carriageId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seatId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromStationId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{toStationId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ticketPrice, mode=IN, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seatType, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleDate, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, --传进来的Map在这个调用存储过程的时候被自动插入返回值的键值对了，具体是因为下面三条代码可以自动写回Map #{resultCode, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resultMsg, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=BIGINT} )}
